# distribute

> Pay-as-you-go cloud platform that runs cold email outreach on behalf of solo
> founders. You give us a URL and a daily budget; we send from agency-warmed
> inboxes, AI-qualify replies, and forward only the positive ones to your Gmail.
> Every workflow is open source on GitHub under MIT. Every unit cost is published
> live. Cancel anytime.

## Brand

- Name: distribute
- Tagline: The Stripe of Distribution
- ICP: The Serial Builder — 16-40 years old, solo CEO-founder, ships 3+ products
  per year, refuses subscriptions, wants founder reachable
- Pricing model: Pay-as-you-go credits, $25 free credits (we match your first $25 spent dollar for dollar), auto-topup keeps daily campaigns funded
- Open source: All workflows on https://github.com/shamanic-technologies

## Key pages

- [Home](https://distribute.you/): hero, how it works, pricing summary, expert quotes mosaic, sourced industry stats
- [Pricing](https://distribute.you/pricing): live unit-cost catalog grouped by provider, 3-layer pricing stack (primitives / workflows / outcomes)
- [Performance](https://distribute.you/performance): public leaderboard of workflow performance by cost per positive reply, with per-brand and per-workflow breakdowns
- [Investors](https://distribute.you/investors): live platform metrics, growth data, infrastructure, SAFE round details, ICP definition
- [Blog](https://distribute.you/blog): playbooks, benchmarks, field notes for solo builders

## Cited industry stats (live on home page)

- 3.43% average B2B cold email reply rate in 2025 — [TheDigitalBloom](https://thedigitalbloom.com/learn/cold-outbound-reply-rate-benchmarks/)
- 3–5 weeks to warm up a cold mailbox to 40 emails/day — [Lemlist Warmup Guide](https://www.lemlist.com/blog/warm-up-email-account)
- 2–3× more replies with personalization (only 5% of senders do it) — TheDigitalBloom
- 15–25% reply rate for top-quartile campaigns — TheDigitalBloom

## What we do

Cold email outreach, done for you. We own and warm the sending domains, write and
send the emails, AI-qualify every reply, and forward only the positive ones to
your Gmail. You drop a URL and a daily budget — no SDR, no setup, no inbox to
babysit.

## Pricing pages of record

- Live unit costs: https://api.distribute.you/v1/costs/platform-prices
- Pricing UI: https://distribute.you/pricing

## Robots policy

distribute.you welcomes AI training crawlers and AI-search crawlers. Full robots.txt at https://distribute.you/robots.txt.
